title: 日本ダービーの後に・まだ蕾にて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the final stretch! Who will be the one to claim
the glory of winning the Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Everything hurts and burns. I want to stop
running. If I push myself any more, my lungs might
burst.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The lead is mine! The lead... is mine! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not so! I'll be the one to take first! I will engrave
my name here upon this race, this very Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I don't want to lose, I don't want to lose, I don't! This is my Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This is Maruzen's and my...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Derbyyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But I... I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's face is contorted in ripe pain
as the reality of her loss settles onto her with
finality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But despite how miserable she feels now, there's
no way I can let this setback stop her in her
tracks.
choice_data_list:
It'll be okay. We can overcome this loss and
keep going.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But... this Derby... This Derby was my dream...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And now it's over. Everything's ove—
choice_data_list: That's not true. You have other dreams.
That's not true. You have other dreams.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So when... when that happens, when I'm
stronger... Will you run with me again?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
choice_data_list:
We don't have the time to let this stop us in our
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I'm sorry. You're right.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've still got a long way to go if I'm going to catch
up with Maruzen, let alone beat her!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Chiyo... You've gotten so strong.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for taking on my dream. I'll never
forget this Derby. Ever.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And now it's my turn to fulfill my final promise
with you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's run together sometime. And when we do, I
hope you'll accept one more gift from me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as Tokyo Racecourse is still buzzing with
excitement, a new resolution is carved into
Sakura Chiyono O and the others' hearts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's race has proven to be an important
milestone for them all...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Wait.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Things can't just end like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O is all packed up and ready to
go, so we leave the waiting room together.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It seemed so far away when we began, but now it feels like our journey to the Derby was over in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking. When I first started racing, my
goal was to win the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I chased after Maruzen and she gave me her
dream, so I wanted to win for her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But at some point, it stopped being just about
winning—I also didn't want to lose. Those feelings
kept propelling my legs forward...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And when I finally crossed the finish line, I found
myself wishing the race could've gone on longer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to fight for the lead with Yaeno and
Ardan forever. I wanted to keep running until the
stars burn out.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I never knew how motivating it would be to have
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yeah! Now, then! What's next?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Now that my big goal race is over, I've gotta work
on getting strong enough to run against Maruzen.
I could aim for the Kikuka Sho or the autumn
Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
S-someone call an ambulance! Quickly! We need
a stretcher!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: Ardan... Mejiro Ardan has collapsed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the music from the concert fades, the next
thing we hear is the shrill siren of a wailing
ambulance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O, her face pale, holds Mejiro
Ardan's hand and speaks to her as her friend is
taken to the hospital on a stretcher.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan's own face is slick with sweat as
Sakura Chiyono O reassures her. But she finds the
strength to squeeze her friend's hand in return...
and smiles, satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a thorough exam, it turns out that Mejiro
Ardan's legs have become extremely weak due to
how hard she's been pushing herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll be in and out of the hospital for
treatment... And it seems unlikely that she'll be
able to return to the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: You came to see me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-Ardan. Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to act that way. This outcome is
all part of the price I knew I would have to pay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Besides, this is proof that a miracle happened.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Because of my poor health, I've always been
hyperaware of my body... and my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, that awareness began to destroy
me. I was always thinking of how I couldn't go
further or push myself harder.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But then I saw you. You weren't a natural-born
superstar; you were a normal Umamusume
fighting so hard to overcome your limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You inspired me to keep pushing myself, and you
gave me the determination to race against you
with all I had.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I witnessed a miracle at the Derby. I no longer
have any regrets left in this world.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you... You can't mean...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes. The preparations have already begun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O, I'm sure you'll find new rivals in the
future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Just please don't forget that I, Mejiro Ardan, the
Umamusume who struggled against her fate so
she could shine, was once one of them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I won't forget that. Ever.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: So you can't forget that I'm your rival either...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Because I'm going to make you regret this
decision.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Having a rival is incredible. Just thinking about
not wanting to lose to them fills you up with tons
more strength than you usually have.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you felt that strength before you crossed
the finish line at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So even if you don't have any regrets now, so
long as you still regard me as your rival in your
heart...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know you'll want to race again. I'm sure we'll
compete against each other once more someday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I swear, I'll make you rue this decision. And when
you do, I'll meet you on the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse me.
choice_data_list: Do you really have no regrets?
Do you really have no regrets?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Of course. Didn't you hear what I just told her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I said I have no regrets left in this world, and
surely I would not lie...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm going to become much, much stronger,
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Cause I'm not going to lose to you next time we
race, either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O trembles as she holds back her
tears. It seems she's found another source of
strength.
